text:
Once upon a time in the sleepy town of Everlight, there was a peculiar old librarian named Elsie. She had a magic lamp that didn’t actually spill ink. Every evening, after closing time, she'd rub it and read dreams. One fateful night, she wished for a forest filled with talking animals. To her delight, each evening after lamp-raising, the forest appeared, and her favorite animal friend, a wise old owl named Rufus, told her tales from the leaves.

One story Rufus told was about a daring squirrel named Hazel. Hazel wanted to visit every attic in the land, so every morning she’d climb up a line of hanging acorns and listen to the stories. One morning, Hazel met a raccoon named Rowdy who offered to take her somewhere incredible—his den. Inside, they met a wise-looking owl who handed Hazel a map to a secret garden hidden within a mountain.

Eager, Hazel followed Rowdy for years, visiting hidden glades
